title: Hanover Ave crossing near Monroe St
description: Residents report difficulty crossing Hanover Avenue during school and peak traffic periods.

title: Safer route to Fosterfields
description: Residents want a clearer walking and biking approach to Fosterfields from nearby neighborhoods.

title: Normandy Heights sidewalk connection
location_text: Normandy Heights Rd near Morris Museum
description: Residents note that the sidewalk connection remains incomplete for reaching the museum and nearby bus stops.

title: More direct route to Woodland School
description: Families describe a need for a more direct and comfortable route to Woodland School.

title: James St over I-287
description: Repeated comments describe vehicle speeds and turning movements as difficult for people walking or biking.
desired_destination: Loantaka Brook Reservation South Street Access

title: Accessible route to Municipal Building
location_text: Municipal Building from neighborhood streets south of Woodland Ave
description: Residents want a more legible accessible route to the municipal building for routine civic visits.
